title: A Certified Modular Hermite Normal Form Kernel in Lean 4: Determinant Contracts, Canonicality, and Explicit Bit Budgets
description: Independent lean-normal-forms research profile 0.1.0: a pure determinant-modulus Hermite normal form value kernel, canonicality proof, fraction-free general-rank wrapper, explicit inverse result boundary, exact operation telemetry, coefficient bounds, and a schoolbook bit-operation budget mirroring Lean's standard integer XGCD.
